name: PCCOOLER Liquid Freezer AIO CPU Cooler, 3.5-inch IPS Display, 360mm ARGB Water Cooling, Durable Dual Ball Bearing Fan, Compatible with AM4/AM5, LGA115X/1200/1700/1851 (CPS GT360 Black)
